title: Moroccan Turkey Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew made with turkey, spices, and dried fruits. Perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper, to taste

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the turkey in batches until browned, about 5 minutes. Set aside.
Add more oil if necessary and cook the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the spices, apricots, and dates. Cook for 1 minute.
Return the turkey to the pot and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 25-30 minutes, or until the turkey is cooked through.
Stir in the parsley and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
